# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source qualifies as an institute-worthy research candidate.

## Why

It is an arXiv preprint that presents a defined method, describes a constructed dataset, and explicitly reports experimental results about software quality outcomes such as completeness, executability, and consistency with requirements. That gives it real empirical substance rather than commentary or theorycrafting.

## Limits
